original_image_tags: Two dark, circular smudge marks or holes are visible at the top of the document, above the header.

elements.description: Two dark, circular smudges or stains at the top of the page near the header. Several stamped markings at the bottom, including a red 'EX-16' stamp, a pink '57 JUL 24 194' stamp, and a black 'RECORDED & INDEXED 36 JUL 16 1947' stamp. Handwritten annotations include blue 'II', red '162-83894-15', and a blue signature.

judge.reason: Description B quotes multiple specific, detailed stamp texts (e.g., 'EX-16', '57 JUL 24 194', 'RECORDED & INDEXED 36 JUL 16 1947') and handwritten annotations that Description A does not mention, creating a contradiction on the specific visual content present.
